hero.title: Effortless cleanliness in Northern Cyprus with SupTemiz
hero.subtitle: Professional cleaning of apartments, villas and offices in Northern Cyprus. We arrive on time, work carefully, and leave only freshness and order.
hero.badge3: ✔ Support in Russian, Turkish and English

step1.title: Submit a request
step1.text: Fill out the form on the website or message us on WhatsApp.

step2.title: We confirm the details
step2.text: We call back to confirm the time, cost and address.

step3.title: We arrive and clean
step3.text: You relax while we bring your space to perfect order.

r1.text: "We ordered a deep clean for our villa in Iskele. They arrived on time and finished everything in one day. Very satisfied!"
r1.author: — Anna

r2.text: "We use the regular office cleaning in Famagusta. Always clean and tidy, no reminders needed."
r2.author: — Sergey

r3.text: "It's great that you can quickly estimate the cost and submit a request right on the website."
r3.author: — Maria

order.title: Book cleaning
order.subtitle: Fill out the form — we'll contact you to confirm the details and time.
order.info1: We work across Northern Cyprus: Famagusta, Iskele, Kyrenia and surroundings
order.info3: You can discuss details via WhatsApp
